_storage: Divine Blessings: armor -> array slot +0x36A684; every other blessing (each level) -> one bit in the bitfield at +0x36BC80 (g_flags 0xD9). total purchased = popcount(0x36BC80)+(armor!=0).
_unmapped_LV2_bits: LV2 of Bolster resists / Extend drop / Boost recovery / Hasten skill / Reduce MP not yet bought (each will be one more bit).
